verdict.evidence: The source states 'Puolustusministeriö lähettää lausuntokierrokselle' (present tense: sends/is sending), while the summary states 'Puolustusministeriö on lähettänyt lausuntokierrokselle' (present perfect: has sent). This shifts the temporal framing from an ongoing/announced action to a completed one. All other temporal elements (the deadline 2.4.2026, future conditional forms, present-tense descriptions of what remains criminalized) are faithfully preserved.
